title: Remove login option and make admin page publicly accessible

requirements.text: Remove all Internet Identity login/logout UI elements from the Navigation component so no login button or user authentication controls are visible to any user.

quotes: remove login option and make the admin page open for all to upload blog post without any interruption

acceptanceCriteria: The Navigation bar has no login button, logout button, or any Internet Identity authentication controls
No authentication-related UI is visible on any page

requirements.text: Make the Admin page (/admin), Create Blog Post page (/admin/create), and Edit Blog Post page (/admin/edit/:id) fully accessible to all visitors without any authentication check, identity guard, or access-denied redirect. Remove any remaining references to Internet Identity identity checks that block or restrict access to these pages.

quotes: make the admin page open for all to upload blog post without any interruption

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating directly to /admin shows the admin posts list without any login prompt or access-denied screen
Navigating to /admin/create shows the create post form without any authentication requirement
All admin actions (create, edit, delete, publish/unpublish) are available to all users without login
The AccessDeniedScreen component is never rendered for admin routes
No identity or principal checks gate any admin page or mutation

requirements.text: Update all React Query hooks and mutations in useQueries.ts that pass an authenticated actor to instead use an anonymous actor for all admin operations (create post, update post, delete post, publish/unpublish post, upload images), so these operations work without Internet Identity login.

quotes: make the admin page open for all to upload blog post without any interruption

acceptanceCriteria: Creating, editing, deleting, and publishing blog posts all succeed when the user is not authenticated
Image uploads for blog posts work without authentication
No mutation fails silently due to missing identity or principal

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko actor to remove any caller-based authorization checks on admin functions (createPost, updatePost, deletePost, publishPost, unpublishPost, uploadImage, and any other admin-only endpoints), so all callers including anonymous principals are permitted to perform these operations.

quotes: make the admin page open for all to upload blog post without any interruption

acceptanceCriteria: Admin backend functions no longer reject calls from anonymous principals
No #Unauthorized or access-denied error is returned for any admin operation
All blog CRUD and image upload operations succeed when called anonymously

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts directly
Do not remove the InternetIdentityProvider wrapper — only remove the login/logout UI elements and authentication guards
nonGoals: Adding any new authentication or role-based access control system
Changing the visual design or branding of the site
Modifying public-facing blog pages or static content pages
